description: Vertical graphic formatted like a shared news article or link card on a white background. The top is a full-color photograph of an auto-body repair shop: a man in safety glasses, a white dust mask, a dark long-sleeve shirt, and gloves kneels and uses a sander on the side panel of a vehicle, while a woman, also in safety glasses and a dust mask with her hair tied back, leans in over him; a red tool chest is at left. Overlaid near the bottom of the photo is a white rounded banner with two logos: 'I-CAR' (blue) and, after a divider, 'APPRENTICESHIPUSA' (navy 'APPRENTICESHIP', red 'USA') with three small stars and red, white, and blue underline accents. Below the photo, large dark-gray sans-serif text reads: 'I-CAR launches two-year apprenticeship program for shops backed by Department of Labor.'
notable_text: I-CAR | APPRENTICESHIPUSA - I-CAR launches two-year apprenticeship program for shops backed by Department of Labor
